title: Turkish Flatbread with Rustic Filling
description: A delicious and easy-to-make flatbread filled with a rustic mixture of cheese, herbs, and spices.
instructions: Roll out the flatbread to a thickness of about 1/4 inch (6 mm).
Mix the crumbled cheese, chopped parsley, minced garlic, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
Spread the rustic cheese mixture evenly over the flatbread, leaving a 1/2 inch (1 cm) border around the edges.
Fold the flatbread in half to enclose the filling, and press the edges together to seal.
Place the flatbread on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the flatbread is golden brown and crispy.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
